name: @tetherto/mdk-plugin-site-hashrate
description: Example plugin: aggregates hashrate history across all workers via the MDK protocol client.

200.description: Site-level hashrate history aggregated by timestamp.

400.description: Invalid date range or MDK client unavailable.

routes.description: Fans out telemetry.pull to every registered worker and returns site-level hashrate history aggregated by timestamp. Defaults to last 7 days when start/end are omitted.
constraints: Requires the MDK client to be connected to an Kernel instance.
Workers must expose a hashrate_history telemetry type.
start and end are optional Unix millisecond timestamps; defaults to last 7 days.

examples.description: Get last 7 days of site hashrate
Get hashrate for a specific range
